sqlMap.select: select * from PolicyForm where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and FormID = #FormID# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.insert: insert into PolicyForm(FormID, PolicyKey, StateCode LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#FormID:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #StateCode# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, FormID, PolicyKey, StateCode from PolicyForm where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.update:
update PolicyForm set
LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PolicyForm where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
delete from PolicyForm where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and FormID = #FormID# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.select: select LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, FormID, PolicyKey, StateCode from PolicyForm where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
select FormID, PolicyKey, StateCode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from PolicyForm where FormID = #FormID# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and FormID = #FormID# and StateCode = #StateCode#
